category_sources: Official repository at https://github.com/ipinfo/cli describes it as the official command line interface for the IPinfo API.
source_facts.description says ipinfo-cli is the official CLI for the IPinfo IP Address API.
display_name_sources: Official repository at https://github.com/ipinfo/cli uses the IPinfo CLI branding.
source_facts.description calls it the official CLI for the IPinfo IP Address API.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official IPinfo site; https://ipinfo.io/developers is the official developer documentation surface for the API.
source_facts.repo is the official CLI repository, whose README documents CLI usage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has value https://github.com/ipinfo/cli, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official repository at https://github.com/ipinfo/cli describes IP geolocation and other IP data API use.
source_facts.description identifies an official API CLI.
